entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM Landscape configuration
entry.content: Hi, Farhat_Umarm,

entry.title: How to change ISU invoice reversal due date?
entry.content:
Hello, I am looking for a way to change the due date of an invoice reversal (as per demand of a client).

Today, it is a standard procedure in SAP to attribute the due date of the invoice to the invoice reversal.

Ex: an invoice with document date 01.01.2024 has a due date of 16.01.2024 (as per the payment terms -> due date must be 15 days from document date for example), when the invoice is reversed on the 15.02.2023, the reversal document still has the due date of 16.01.2024. 

What I want is for the invoice reversal to have the same treatement as the invoice which means a due date of 30.02.2024 (15 days from document date)

Is there any way to manipulate the due dates for reversal documents through an event? I looked in R428 but didn't seem to find anything.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: How to use UDF values in FSM HTML report?
entry.content: Hello Krzysztof, I add the following as expection handling for UDF null values.

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM Landscape configuration
entry.content: Hi, Farhat_Umar, I am not exactly sure what it is you are trying to do here. You will make a connection to the system/service in Cloud ALM by following the configuration for the relevant system/service found at: https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/setup-managed-services.html. If this does not help answer your question, can you provide more detail of exactly what you are attempting to do? Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Audio stream in AppGyver Community Edition
entry.content:
Hi, you can find attached the tree view. As you can see it is a very simple scroll view , where the list of objects is binded in repeat to a page variable.

In the meantime I solved binding a web view to the field "song title" of the variable, that's an http URL. But I'm not sure that this is the best solution. I am an absolute beginner, still studying when I have time. 

What do you think? Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Managing Recurring Pay Components in SuccessFactors Using Batch Upsert
entry.content: That was helpful, great @ankitkumarpatel

entry.title: Re: How to use UDF values in FSM HTML report?
entry.content:
Hello @krzysztof_szalach ,
I added the following as exception handling for UDF null values in the handlebarsSapHelpers. However, I am sure that it worked 3 weeks ago.

Now it does not work anymore, and I dont really changed anything... 😞 It is showing an error, when the UDF value is empty "cannot read value from undefined". If I check for undefined or array length 0 - both is not working.. I am desperate... That is really strange. 

Do you have another tip? 
Thanks so much.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Customer Influence Q1 2024
entry.content:
In our first QRC release in 2024 we have 56 new Innovations in SAP Analytics Cloud. Of the items delivered we covered 23 Customer Influence Requests with more than 800 votes. Let's dive in and see what they are.

Data Integration and Data Modeling

We had a number of new innovation for Data Wranglers covering Hierarchies and Time dimensions, amassing more than 200 votes, which included:

Live SAP BW – improved support of time-dependent hierarchies

For SAP BW live connections, users can now use version-dependent and time-dependent hierarchies in tables and chart widgets. This feature is only available in the optimized story experience. 

To-date formulas in model calculations

Users can now create calculated measures or calculated accounts using YTD (Year-to-Date), QTD (Quarter-to-Date), and MTD (Month-to-Date) functions at model level.  These functions display running totals across year, quarter, or month levels of date granularity, respectively. This enables users to compare values against a budget, a target, or previous periods. 

 Flexible Modeling

The Modeler has been extensively redesigned to align with the changes made to models in SAP Analytics Cloud. Models now have greater flexibility and users can select how to build a model.

When creating a new model in the Modeler, the application allows users to decide whether to focus on the data first to build the structure of the model or build the structure first and then add the data.

For the first version of the new modeler, users will be able to experience the new data first approach, which allows creation of new models while solely focusing on the data you want to work with. There is no wrangling step, the application generates the model automatically. Users import the data and carry out all the necessary transformation, while the application handles the structure of the model automatically.

New Model – Disaggregation based on another measure

New disaggregation types, “Reference to Another Measure” allows on-the-fly disaggregation using proportions from another measure. It comes with two modes: 

  • Total Distribution - disaggregates total value entered ​
  • Delta Distribution - disaggregates delta to the total value entered


    Until now, disaggregation was driven automatically by the aggregation type of measure and the data state. With this enhancement, you can now choose the disaggregation type and control the disaggregation scope, whether you want to disaggregate the total value entered or just the delta to the value entered.

entry.title: Revolutionizing E-Procurement with Generative AI: Enhancing Catalogs for Improved Decision making
entry.content:
Expanding upon the blog How to differentiate within a marketplace...

AI will change all aspects of our professional life in the coming months and years.   The iteration speed will make it hard for business and software to keep pace.  

Below is an AI-generated blog on this topic. You will note a detailed prompt leads to a better output. However, the response still remains summary. While AI can generate useful content summaries, like in the blog example below, it often requires follow-up prompts and iterations to elicit the level of detail needed for decision-making.

The "garbage in, garbage out" principle is critical - AI outputs are only as good as the data and prompts generated. For applications like generating product catalog content and search results, pulling in high-quality data from diverse sources like suppliers, buyers, manufacturers, and 3rd party providers will be key to getting proper AI-generated descriptions, images, and search rankings.

Ecommerce and e-procurement solutions must combine AI with other product content, attributes, and value-adds to give buyers the full context they need. This includes detailed specs, use cases, compatible products, ratings and reviews, rich media, and more. This curated domain knowledge is essential for helping users find the right products and make confident purchase decisions.

The winners in this space will likely be the companies that can leverage AI's speed and scale while maintaining quality control over the underlying training data and thoughtfully integrating AI into a broader product content and decision support strategy. As AI rapidly evolves, it will be fascinating to see how leading providers tackle this challenge. 

 

Claude Prompt

“Compose a professional blog highlighting how Gen AI, especially GPT-4, enhances electronic catalogs in e-procurement like SAP Ariba. Detail the impact of content incorporating product attributes, personal search history, company standards, product and supplier reviews, sustainable attributes, and company profiles on decision-making. Explore the benefits of blending supplier, 3rd party, and manufacturer-provided data. Compare the value of static Product Information Management (PIM) versus dynamically generated content. Evaluate legal and supply chain risks associated with AI in search processes and propose mitigation methods. Examine the compatibility of this approach for indirect versus direct goods, addressing specific concerns for simple and complex services.”

Claude Response

“The advent of Generative AI, particularly GPT-4, has opened up new possibilities for enhancing electronic catalogs in e-procurement platforms like SAP Ariba. By leveraging the power of AI, companies can now provide more personalized, informative, and dynamic content to streamline the procurement process and improve decision-making. This blog post explores the impact of AI-enhanced content on electronic catalogs and the benefits of integrating data from various sources. We also discuss the risks associated with AI in search processes and propose mitigation strategies, as well as examine the compatibility of this approach for different types of goods and services.

Enhancing Electronic Catalogs with AI-Generated Content: GPT-4 can generate content that incorporates a wide range of relevant information, such as product attributes, personal search history, company standards, product and supplier reviews, sustainable attributes, and company profiles. By presenting this information in a clear and concise manner, AI-enhanced electronic catalogs enable procurement professionals to make more informed decisions. The AI-generated content can be tailored to the specific needs and preferences of each user, providing a personalized experience that improves the efficiency and effectiveness of the procurement process.

Blending Data from Multiple Sources: To create a comprehensive and accurate electronic catalog, it is essential to integrate data from various sources, including suppliers, third-party providers, and manufacturers. GPT-4 can help blend this information seamlessly, ensuring that procurement professionals have access to the most up-to-date and relevant data. By combining data from multiple sources, AI-enhanced electronic catalogs provide a more complete picture of the products and services available, enabling better decision-making and reducing the risk of errors or inconsistencies.

Static PIM vs. Dynamically Generated Content: Traditional Product Information Management (PIM) systems rely on static, manually updated content, which can quickly become outdated and fail to keep pace with the ever-changing market. In contrast, AI-generated content is dynamic and can be updated in real-time based on the latest data and insights. This approach ensures that procurement professionals always have access to the most current and accurate information, reducing the risk of making decisions based on outdated or incomplete data.

Legal and Supply Chain Risks: While AI-enhanced electronic catalogs offer numerous benefits, it is important to consider the legal and supply chain risks associated with this approach. For example, there may be concerns around data privacy, intellectual property rights, and the accuracy of AI-generated content. To mitigate these risks, companies should implement robust data governance policies, ensure transparency in their AI processes, and regularly monitor and validate the content generated by AI systems. Additionally, companies should work closely with their legal teams to ensure compliance with relevant regulations and standards.

Compatibility with Indirect and Direct Goods: AI-enhanced electronic catalogs can be applied to both indirect and direct goods, as well as simple and complex services. However, the specific concerns and requirements may vary depending on the type of goods or services being procured. For indirect goods, such as office supplies and maintenance products, the focus may be on streamlining the purchasing process and ensuring the best value for money. In contrast, for direct goods and complex services, such as raw materials and consulting services, there may be a greater emphasis on quality, reliability, and compliance with specific industry standards. AI-enhanced electronic catalogs can be adapted to address these specific concerns, providing tailored content and recommendations based on the unique requirements of each category.

Conclusion: Generative AI, especially GPT-4, has the potential to revolutionize e-procurement by enhancing electronic catalogs with personalized, dynamic, and comprehensive content. By blending data from multiple sources and providing real-time updates, AI-enhanced electronic catalogs enable procurement professionals to make more informed decisions and streamline the procurement process. While there are legal and supply chain risks associated with this approach, these can be mitigated through robust data governance, transparency, and collaboration with legal teams. As companies continue to adopt AI in their e-procurement processes, it is essential to consider the specific requirements of different types of goods and services to ensure the best outcomes for their organizations.”

entry.title: How to find a custom code enhanced in standard functionality
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In CO01 and CO02 transaction functionality some custom code enhanced, Not sure by user exit or customer exit or BADI or implicit enhancement. I need to find the custom logic. Is there any way to find that custom logic quickly. 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Extra plan order is created
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to ask your help. 

When a planned order is too late for a sales order (MTO), SAP will create a new order with an earlier date. How can i avoid this? I just want a warning, not a new plan order.

Thank you!

Is that a program or a table that I can seek this kind of information ? My team is not the one that create the roles.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant
entry.content:
What i found and loved in SAP are: 

Direct Business Impact: The smooth operation of SAP systems directly impacts a company's efficiency. That's why I'm interested to learn more about SAP because it has a tangible impact on the business.

Continuous Learning: The SAP landscape is constantly evolving. And I'd love to be in a field that requires continuous learning and staying up-to-date with the latest advancements.

entry.title: Payment medium without payment advices
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in need of the following. We need to get the file to send to the Bank in a diferente moment from the moment we send the payment advices to vendors

So we  would like to know how  we can obtain the payment method in the F110 transaction without sending payment notices by email

Is this possible?

Thank you in advance

João

entry.title: Re: Get the label of the field in runtime for RAP in BTP
entry.content:
Dear Patrick.

We tested it and no data element label or description is shown:

Is there any option to get this data?

We tried to do something like this:

DATA(test3) = xco_cp_abap_repository=>object->dtel->for( 'BUKRS' )->content( ).

test3->get_long_field_label( RECEIVING rs_long_field_label = DATA(test4) ).

 

but test4 has the long_field_label in german and we did not find how to pass language parameter.

 

Regards

entry.title: AI chatbot
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a large amount of content describing many different processes. this is in ppt, pdf, word, webpage etc. format. I would like to find a solution like chatbot for the team where they can quickly find an answer they are looking for, if you know is any internal solution or anyone that can help, please let me know.

Thanks.

entry.title: Query SQL regeneration
entry.content:
there is a way (parameter ?) to force the regeneration of all query of a document?

I develop my universes(unx) and reports using a Informix DB but our customer have both Informix or Oracle. 

Everithing is working fine but when i deliver the report to a custumer with Oracle db i ned to open the report and force the regeneration of SQL. 

I can solve importing and re-exporting universe from IDT but this operation is not very fast if i have to each time for each universe.

Thank you

Paolo

Will try it out and update later, thanks!

please approach me on Teams I can share more information about this.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

Here's a video demo of how this works using my Visual CUT software.

entry.title: using iFrame in Learning Module
entry.content:
Hello community,

Considering the issue of third-party cookie deprecation  (https://d.dam.sap.com/a/s3hKB1L/Third%20Party%20Cookies%20Frequently%20Asked%20Questions.pdf?rc=10) and its impact on SAP SuccessFactors, I'm curious about the repercussions when using UI5 extensions (on BTP) embedded within iframes in the LMS. Would linking to open in a new tab address this problem? Are there any other impacts we should be aware of?

Thanks,

Anderson

entry.title: Eventbericht | SAP Financials Forum 2024, DE Edition (18.-20. März)
entry.content:
In seiner 11. Edition fand das SAP Financials Forum vom 18.-20. März 2024 erneut in hybrider Form statt und bot mehr als 180 Teilnehmern die Gelegenheit, flexibel in Walldorf oder virtuell mehr zu den aktuellen Neuerungen im Bereich SAP Financials zu erfahren.
Drei Tage mit über 18 Expertenvorträgen, drei Kundenvorträgen, interaktiven Austauschrunden mit Experten, zwei Abendveranstaltungen, zwei Basic-Hands-on-Sessions sowie jeder Menge Möglichkeit zum Netzwerken standen auf dem Programm. Erfahren Sie mehr dazu in diesem Blogpost.

Einblick in Transformationsprozesse bei der SAP

Nach einer Begrüßung durch die Organisatoren, Cem Uysal und Magnus Metzler, machte Tobias Naumann, Chief Financial Officer der SAP Deutschland, mit seiner Keynote den inhaltlichen Auftakt und bot einen eindrücklichen Blick hinter die Kulissen der Transformationsprozesse im Finanzbereich bei der SAP.

 

Ein bunter Strauß aus über 18 verschiedenen Schulungsvorträgen

Den Kern des Forums bildeten mehrere parallel stattfindende Vortragsblöcke, bei denen sich die Teilnehmer ihre Lieblingsthemen auswählen und damit ihre Agenda individuell zusammenstellen konnten. In 75 bis 90-minütigen Schulungsvorträgen, die theoretische Hinführung, Systemdemos und „Q&A-Sessions“ vereinten, präsentierten SAP-ExpertInnen verschiedene Top-Themen und Neuerungen aus dem Bereich SAP Financials.

 

Einblicke in Kundenprojekte im Kontext Migration zu SAP S/4HANA

Welche Erfahrungen machen Kunden im Finance-Bereich bei der Migration zu SAP S/4HANA? Welche Herausforderungen sind hierbei zu meistern und von welchen Tipps können andere Firmen in derselben Situation profitieren? Referenten der Mercedes-Benz AG, Deutsche Börse Group, und SNP gaben exemplarische Einblicke in ihre Projekte und stellten sich im Anschluss den zahlreichen Fragen aus dem physischen und virtuellen Raum.
Drei sehr spannende Vorträge aus der Praxis, die eine tolle Ergänzung zu den Expertenvorträgen aus SAP-interner Perspektive darstellten!

 

Netzwerken und „Meet the Expert“-Sessions

Als zusätzliche Plattform zum inhaltlichen Austausch zwischen Teilnehmern und Referenten standen auch in diesem Jahr wieder hybride „Meet the Expert“-Sessions auf dem Programm. Parallel zu den Kaffeepausen konnten sich alle interessierten Teilnehmer in 30-minütigen Sessions an einem hybridem Stehtisch-Setup mit den Referenten des Forums über fachspezifische Detailfragen zu Finance, Controlling, Cash Management und Lernangebote auf learning.sap.com austauschen. Eine großartige Möglichkeit zum vertieften Austausch zwischen den Teilnehmern und Experten!

 

Basic-Hands-on-Sessions

Als zusätzliches Event-Highlight konnten sich die Teilnehmer vorab für zwei 90-minütige Schulungsworkshops zu den Themenbereichen CDS-based reporting und Anlagenbuchhaltung unter Universal Parallel Accounting anmelden. Bei diesen Kurztrainings hatten die Teilnehmer die Möglichkeit, nach einer kurzen theoretischen Einführung eines SAP-Experten selbstständig Übungsszenarien an einem SAP-Live-System anhand ausgewählter Aufgaben durchzuführen. Eine willkomene, aktivierende Abwechslung.

 

Abendevent im Doppelpack und Tour durch SAPs Industry Pop-up-Factory

Eine gelungene, interaktive Abrundung der Tage bildete das Abendevent am Dienstag, bei dem sich die Teilnehmer wahlweise an einem Abendessen im „Cloud44“ SAP Guest House oder an einer packenden, virtuellen Schnitzeljagd, ausgestattet mit einem Getränkepaket, teilnehmen könnten.

Wer SAP-Lösungen einmal live in einem integrierten, vernetzten Produktionsszenario kennen lernen möchte, hatte zudem die Möglichkeit an einer von zwei Führungen durch die SAP Pop-Up-Factory teilzunehmen, in der anschaulich der Mehrwert von SAP-Lösungen in Aktion sichtbar und erfahrbar wird.

 

Ausblick

Drei informative Tage voller spannender Angebote zum Lernen und Netzwerken liegen hinter den Teilnehmern und bereits jetzt freuen wir uns, das nächste deutsche SAP Financials Forum anzukündigen, welches voraussichtlich vom 17. Bis 20. März 2025 stattfindet.
Mehr dazu finden Sie ab Herbst 2024 in unserem Webshop (Link). Alternativ bekommen Sie kostenlos regelmäßig News aus dem Bereich SAP Financials über unsere Gruppen auf WorkZone  (Zur Anmeldung) oder auch auf Linkedin (Zur Anmeldung).


Bilder: Daniel Höhr, Magnus Metzler, SAP
Autor: Magnus Metzler

entry.title: Hello Introduction

Thank you for your consideration and information.

entry.title: Re: Sharing database tables accross CAP project
entry.content: There are several resources addressing this topic. Look for cross hdi container access.  Specifically, this tutorial is great: Access a Classic Schema from SAP Business Application Studio | SAP Tutorials

entry.title: Re: JCo IDoc send is waiting for IDoc to complete processing
entry.content:

This is perfect. We tried the setup with the Port Type ABAP-PI in transaction WE21 and then sending with that port and it works just as you describe.

Kind Regards

Ingo

entry.title: Re: When scheduline line get deliver block in sales order
entry.content: I have the same issue. I checked the config and mv45afzz move to VBEP form but there is no config or code that is causing schedule line block. I debugged it is coming in some standard forms. If you find an answer please share.

entry.title: Re: HANA Calculation View and Package Visibility
entry.content:
Hello,

With HANA on-premise, you have 3 type of roles: repository role, catalog role, hdi role.
See comparaison here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/b3ee5778bc2e4a089d3299b82ec762a7/3360ac839b844171837dce4f7c5f1481.html
Using repository role, you are right, you can only grant either access to the full _SYS_BIC schema or you would need to manually assign each single views one by one.
Using catalog role, there would be the workaround to grant all the views from one package via script (instead of doing it manually). Here is a script example:

DO BEGIN
DECLARE CURSOR c_objects FOR SELECT
"SCHEMA_NAME",
"OBJECT_NAME"
FROM "SYS"."OBJECTS"
WHERE "SCHEMA_NAME" = '_SYS_BIC'
AND "OBJECT_TYPE" = 'VIEW'
AND "OBJECT_NAME" NOT LIKE '/TAB/EXAMPLE%'
AND "OBJECT_NAME" NOT LIKE '%/dp/%'
AND "OBJECT_NAME" NOT LIKE '%/hier/%'
AND "OBJECT_NAME" NOT LIKE '%/proc/%'
AND "OBJECT_NAME" LIKE 'MyPackagePath%' ;

DECLARE EXIT HANDLER FOR SQLEXCEPTION SELECT ::SQL_ERROR_CODE, ::SQL_ERROR_MESSAGE FROM DUMMY;

FOR object AS c_objects
DO
EXEC 'GRANT SELECT ON "'|| object.SCHEMA_NAME || '"."'|| object.OBJECT_NAME || '" TO 'MY_CATALOG_ROLE'";
END FOR;
END;

Using hdi role, it supports <wildcard_object_identifier> syntax (see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/3823b0f33420468ba5f1cf7f59bd6bd9/625d7733c30b4666b4a522d7fa68a550.html?locale=en-US&q=%3Cwildcard_object_identifier%3E )
Here is an example:
{
"role": {
"name": "MyHDIRole",
"object_privileges": [{
"name": "MyFolder%",
"type": "VIEW",
"privileges": ["SELECT"],
"pattern_mode": "include"
}]
}
}

entry.title: Error handling with SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hello community,

I created an irpa project to create fixed assets in S4 Hana Cloud Public.

This project is composed of a main automation which retrieves data from a Google sheet. And a sub automation which will be called in a loop to create the Fixed Assets. This Sub automation is essentially composed of “Set Element” and “Click” type activities. All of this sub automation is in a Try/catch to capture possible technical errors during the execution of the project.

However, I cannot find good practices for capturing all potential business errors from the S4 screens (status bar, pop ups... For the moment, error handling is done via a timeout. In case the data would not be good, the pop up or status bar is displayed, and the robot will stop on a timeout because the screen is not displayed.

What I would like is that as soon as there has an error displayed in a Pop Up or Status bar, then I would like to get this error message.

Thanks for your advices

entry.title: Re: Document is picking different number Range than mesti...
entry.content:
Check if there is a development in your system and Number Range Key for the Document Type is determined from a Custom (Z) Table.  

Typically the Custom Development can be found in USEREXIT_NUMBER_RANGE in MV45AFZZ for Sales Orders. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: To use variable name as field name
entry.content:
Hi Sandra_Rossim

Thank you for your response.

Instead of declaring the constants or hard coded values like 'ZMATNR' , is there a way using offset or getting it from the variable lv_zmatnr. After lv_[name] , the name will be fetched as fieldname.

I also understand to achieve it by declaring a structure or the fields in the class method.  I have a similar one, defined it as a structure and derive it from the field cat. 

DATA(alv_field_names) = zcl_abap_get_comp_names=>create( alv_fields ).

entry.title: Re: Memory Usage Statistics
entry.content: You can find the exact definitions anywhere but more or less: extended memory is usually for big memory usage, private memory is used when there's too much memory needed and that blocks the work process for the program (so it's not very good for the load distribution).

entry.title: Re: Hello Introduction
entry.content: Hello and welcome @emilywhipkey - thanks for the introduction! Good luck with the Digital Skills Initiative. The best place to start is over in the Beginner Corner, this is one of our SAP Learning Groups. Please read the blog post from @David_Chaviano - and the relevant email address is also listed there.

entry.title: Re: How to create new data or delete, update with S/4HANA data in Build Apps?
entry.content:
The Above information examines the processes for creating, deleting, and modifying data within the following

Homeworkify AI

entry.title: Re: Simplify SSO with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) & SAP Identity Authentication Service
entry.content:
Hi

Nice blog but one thing is missing

at the end go to application&resources > "delected application" > Conditional Authentication >  Default Authenticating Identity Provider

and change the Default Identity Provider to azure.

more inforamation can be found here: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-ias-azure-ad.html

see image below

entry.title: Isolated to one Learner - the learning home page displays incorrect configuration
entry.content:
I have one person who's learning home page displays a funky (for lack of a better term) configuration on his laptop, in Edge and Chrome, after clearing cache and after restarting his laptop. I have confirmed his learning user role, his SF role, his user domain, and his Organization. All is fine when I proxy in as him.

I'm stumped and I want to check to see if anyone is familiar with a fix before I go to SAP. Even suggestions on what to look for will be appreciated. 

Again, it is isolated to one user. Attached shows the bad and good. 

🤔 

Becky

entry.title: Re: Staging bay not assigned to ODO or WT when door assig...
entry.content: Ok, so finally i have created a unique Staging area determination indicator for all the staging areas and it worked!! thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
Hi @VanessaLi,

I have a similar question to a previous one, can we connect 2 TEST SF instances to the same Microsoft Teams Tenant? we have 2 test instances, one in Germany and one in China and only one MS Teams

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
@David_Chaviano 

I see it is a product for organizations using the software. Thank you very much👍

entry.title: Re: How to use Transaction BD87 to reprocess failed IDocs
entry.content: Informative blog Mohit, 👍

entry.title: Re: STMS Reconfiguration for SAP System after Refresh.
entry.content: Thanks for this comprehensive blog, very useful in maintenance and post system refresh activities. 😊

entry.title: SAP HANA reclaiming rights on a deactivated user's schema
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a SAP HANA (Web IDE) environment on CAL where we defined a model a while ago. In the meantime the schema user account was deactivated, and our SYSTEM user doesn't have the privileges other than the standard SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE without grant option. Our SYS user is in a deactivated state as well, and the XSA_ADMIN cannot grant other users any privileges on that schema. The users don't even have privileges to use GRANT_CONTAINER_SCHEMA_PRIVILEGES.

We tried going through HANA Cockpit like shown in https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-activate-a-user-from-user-management-of-sap-btp-hana-cloud-cockpit/qaq-p/13603277 but we can't see the Activate button. SQL with the admin option in Web IDE and connecting through DBeaver with the SYSTEM user return "insufficient privileges". What are our options to get admin rights or give other users grants on the schema? Alternatively, how can we activate the schema or the SYS user?

entry.title: Is there a way to convert 3D pdf images to VDS4 format ?
entry.content: Hi, Is there a  way to convert 3D pdf images to VDS4 image format. The requirement is to show 3d pdf images in fiori applications.

entry.title: Duplicidad en número de empleado
entry.content:
Hola, si tengo un colaborador en distintas sociedades es necesario que al regresar a su sociedad origen se le asigne un nuevo numero de personal? 

En el supuesto que si tenga asignado un nuevo número de personal, cuales serian las afectaciones en SAP ECP?

Saludos desde México.

entry.title: Initiatives in Goal management
entry.content: What alternative do you offer for customers that use Initiatives and it is going to be sunset in the Latest version of Goal Management?

entry.title: How to avoid creating a production order without material availability?
entry.content:
I want to create production orders only with available material.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to avoid creating a production order without mate...
entry.content:
Hi,

In this case, you have the option to use the availability check when creating a production order, please see more details in the following link from SAP Help:

  • SAP Help - Availability Check

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: HANA Calculation View and Package Visibility
entry.content:
Hi Cocquerel,

Thank you for the reply!

My actual problem is that I want to hide views that are required to execute consumption view and are currently visible since users have to have SELECT privilege on them. If this privilege is revoked, they wont see them and wont be able to execute the consumption view. 

Current:

Current

Desired

Desired

Is that something that is achievable?

Br,
Aleks.

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 2
entry.content:
As an ABAPer have borrowed liberally from other contributors:

const { CloudEvent, HTTP} = require("cloudevents");

// Create a new CloudEvent
const ce = new CloudEvent({ 
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "id": "6caee628-04a1-4565-ae1e-8eb6d4370c96",
  "type": "this.is.made.up.create",
  "source": "/who/knows",
  "time": "2024-03-07T08:00:00Z",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "data": {
    "number": "987654321"
}
}); 

//
const { headers, body } = HTTP.structured(ce);

console.log(
   "Headers:", "\n",
    JSON.stringify(headers, null, 2), "\n",
    "Body:", "\n",
    JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(body), null, 2));

entry.title: webi client Load Driver Call: Initialize (WIS 00000)
entry.content:
Hi,

While importing locally saved .unx file in my Sap Webi Client 4.1 i do get Load Driver Call: Initialize (WIS 00000) error.  I have searched the forum an the only solution was to copy the file into: C:\Documents and Settings\admin\Application Data\SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\Universes repository,  which did not solve my problem.  I am able to import .xlsx file into Webi, why Universe file does not get imported?

entry.title: Re: webi client Load Driver Call: Initialize (WIS 00000)
entry.content: Please do not post a question about SAP Web sites (community, etc.) if it's not a question about SAP Web sites! You can use Technology Q&A or any groups.

entry.title: Re: To use variable name as field name
entry.content: Please do not post a solution. Instead, click on the "Reply" of the answer.

entry.title: Re: To use variable name as field name
entry.content: As I said, "you have to code yourself as I don't have the code available right now".

entry.title: Re-block documents in GTS that were accidently released
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to block a Sales Order document that might have been accidently released(manually) for SPL in GTS? This sales orders does not have a follow on document created in ECC yet.

 

Regards,

Absheen

entry.title: Re: Adding two XML files based on condition using Groovy...
entry.content: Hey Shiva, there is one more way to solve this, you can use HashMap to store only related content and use content XML writer to get the desired output, this will be simple and fast as well.

entry.title: Re: WebUI in ChaRM - How to change field label?
entry.content:
Hi Deepa,

Thanks for your answer. I already know the traditional procedure for adjusting the fields in WebUI. But the change of the mentioned field label is not saved. If you think this is a bug, I will open the SAP ticket. But I thought there are other ways for field editing.

Best Regards,

Sergey

entry.title: Add new User Group with SAP Plant Connectivity (PCo) in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hello,

I established a successful connection from SAP DM over Cloud Connector to SAP Plant Connectivity via certificates signed by our CA.

I set System Mapping Configuration to "Principal type: None". If I understand correctly that means, I can define a User Group with rights to perform actions on PCo side (according Help Portal User-Groups ) 

I followed the steps of the Help Portal, but in PCo configuration under User Group "Add":

I can't see any Items in the list: 

Via DevTools I see the request when I click on Go, but the response is empty: 

Has someone every created User Groups and can help me out? 

BR
Nico

entry.title: Deprecated scope items BH1,BJ1 ,etc in Asset management
entry.content: Deprecated scope items cannot be activated in cloud post 2302 release. Please clarify if this applicable for public cloud or private cloud or both?

entry.title: Re: SAP AI Core not exist on trial account
entry.content: how access it?

entry.title: Re: Sharing database tables accross CAP project
entry.content: this is what I wanted, I will read on this, thanks

entry.title: Re: Audio stream in AppGyver Community Edition
entry.content:
In addition, I can show you all the options that the webmaster provided me to view the details of each song.

https URL (the one I used as web view):

https://www.radiojapp.it/radiojapplayer_bis/song_title.html

javascript:

<script language="javascript" type="text/javascript" src="https://eu1.fastcast4u.com:2199/system/streaminfo.js"></script>

html code:

<span class="cc_streaminfo" data-type="song" data-username="kyyvazmd2">Loading ...</span>
[16/3, 16:27]

entry.title: SAP technologies - Adopt, use, no use anymore
entry.content:
Community,

A couple of weeks  ack I saw a post on the community about a new feature released by SAP which shows a kind of map diagram with sap technologies recommended to adopt, other ones that could be still used and other ones to start thinking about not using anymore.

Anyone aware of it? Not able to find it anymore. :).

Thanks,

entry.title: slow-moving indicator - wrong value
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

during SAP public cloud implementation we found differences in Slow or Non-moving materials app.

Based on the SAP help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/276b1b645ec64e808e430b363d6efd6b.html?profile=20087413&source=productlink-webassistant the value for slow-moving indicator should be 5,49. But in the system, we have value 5,14.

Qcons = 45

Qstock = 19955

NOdays = 15

 

Do you have any ideas about what could cause these differences?

entry.title: Re: Search and Data Exploration with SAP Analytics Cloud Webinar Q&A
entry.content:
Looks like the order of changing the Measure facets still not available. I am working on a dashboard where we need to add explore view and trying to add a custom ordering with Measures (this is easy if we are having a table, then from builder paned in measures we can add custom order) still can see A-Z, Z-A and Default Order only and no option to edit member order in Measures. 

If we are having table then we have below options.

With Explorer view no options in builder panel.

 

Any advice please.... this is with HANA Live connection,

entry.title: Failed to load database information
entry.content:
Hi

I am quite new to the Crystal reports and getting below error when i tried to run this on new laptop. This is an old desktop vb.net application. Which we are trying to update oracle native client to new version on new laptop.  Following version of crystal reports are installed on my system. 

 

 

Please let me know how i can find the exact error and how to resolve the issue.  The system is 64bit os but the application is running on 32bit mode.

entry.title: Looking to allow file uploads directly into SAP Build forms or apps
entry.content:
Hello friends,

There currently is no "Upload Document" component when you try to create a "Form" in SAP Build Process Automation. I am looking for a workaround for this problem or a way to upload a document in SAP Build Apps.

I am trying to find a way to allow the end user to upload files directly into Build Apps or Build Automations. There are some methods that including allowing the end user to type in a file path and having their Desktop Agent fetch the file itself. However, I am looking to complete a process where the end user does not need to have the Desktop Agent installed to complete the process. I may need a custom code component.

Any insight will be appreciated.

Thank you,

Julien

entry.title: Query- special price list of business partners
entry.content:
Hello everyone.
I need your support please with the following query.

When querying the OSPP table it does not give me the correct prices for some items.
What is the table or field that I need to call so that the query shows me the prices after the discount?
I add an image.


Appreciate your help.
Thank you so much.
Greetings.

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Cost Center on Asset Acquisition credit
entry.content: Thanks for the response, why are we having to use a clearing application to post an asset acquisition with the cost information as opposed to the asset acquisition app. How would this work for retirements with sales and other areas where the asset posting has incomplete object postings?

entry.title: Re: Our Secret Skills
entry.content: The primary difference between AI and humans is that we ARE HUMAN. We have qualities that an AI can't possibly replicate. Like several mentioned, there is empathy, feelings, common sense, and decisions we make that aren't based on some trained algorithm. Humans will always have to be part of the AI creation, training, and verification. I'm not ready to let bots take over my world....at least not yet!

entry.title: SAP IAM versus Copperleaf Asset
entry.content:
Dear community,

Does anyone know the main functionalities that Copperleaf Asset (recently named as an SAP endorsed application) has that make it stand out from SAP IAM functionalities?

Enhanced dashboards, better asset modelling? Other?

I am wondering how I could leverage those supposed additional functionalities? 

Many thanks for your reply!

#eam #iam #pm #copperleaf #asset

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Boa tarde Luize!

Obrigada por compartilhar este conteúdo!! Me ajudou muito a validar a aplicação das notas no nosso sistema! 🙂

Estamos aguardando ansiosos a liberação das notas para o GRC. Será que sai mesmo até final de março, já que agora foi postergado para 01/07?

Queria apenas confirmar com vc, sobre o campo INDDEDUZDESON, tenho que colocar a regra direto nos enhancements, certo?

Obrigada! 

Lúcia

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content: If it's any help, in App #91072, I have deleted every page (in a copy) and updated all the marketplace items and still not able to make a web build.  If I create a new app all is fine, except I cannot copy pages from my app to another new one.

entry.title: Re: 2- Factor Authentication for your S4Hana Cloud tenant
entry.content:
Hi Amith

Is it possible to setup 2 factor authentication for end users, not the IAS admin user? We want to enable the 2 factor authentication for the business users that don't have admin access to IAS. 

Thanks,
Wenling

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now
entry.content:
Julie

When I create a new license file for A4H and import it I get the following error


This system's system number is "000000000800888417", but there is a license key for system number "000000000800899601" in the license key file.

I double-checked my hardware key.  The URL I used is https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap

Ramesh

entry.title: Re: Deprecated scope items BH1,BJ1 ,etc in Asset management
entry.content:
Hi hakim_mkz

 

The depreciation of the Scope items mentioned is only applicable to S/4HANA Public Cloud .

For S/4HANA Private Cloud ( 2023 and 2022 ) the Scope items are still activatable 

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Line break problem in open DATAset after additon LENGTH NO END OF LINE .
entry.content: I know this is 13 years old...but if anyone is looking for the answer: use addition "NO END OF LINE" in your transfer statement to avoid the final line break.

entry.title: Re: How to give solving priority to calculated measure ov...
entry.content:
@Sorro 

You will see the calculation priority here

@namas1994 Thanks for the excellent blog series. We have a similar requirement in my project where I am trying to add the Excel upload functionality in my RAP based app.

I get the following error, when I click on the Excel Upload button:

 

As suggested by @DiegoValdivia , I changed the fragment name set in the controller, but no luck. Any pointers are greatly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Fiori application > Connect to an OData Service
entry.content:
Hi!

By Eclipse I created the report (ODataV2) and I would like the create a template FIORI by BAS.

Could you help me?

Below are the steps created and which URL should I put?

 

In BAS 

Thank you

entry.title: Bucket Planning in PPDS is not working properly
entry.content:
Hi,

we use PPDS Optimizer running in buckets for orders with multiple operations, most of the resources are multi resources. But the results are not good, the optimizer does not bring the resource utilization up to 100%.

the orders contain between 4 to 8 operations on multi-mixed resources.

What shall I do to make the optimizer fulfill the utilization 100%?

 

Kr,

Walter

entry.title: Re: corrupt data when uploading html file with GUI_UPLOAD
entry.content:
You are uploading a file from you PC to SAP through an ABAP program using function module GUI_UPLOAD ?

Then you save the file in the GOS ?

And then you try to open the file that is in the GOS ? This is were the problem occurs ?

entry.title: Crystal reports formula get value from another column based on value from a third column
entry.content:
Hi The following is my sql query output.:

I want to return (var Name parTxtID) A24/0012 from the first row second column (text_id) if the parent_aliquot in the second row second column (var parSampNum) 74465 for (var SampNum ) 74466 is equal to the value in first row first column - 74465.

Can anyone help me with the crystal reports formula for this?

Regards

entry.title: SAP Fiori development newsletter March 2024 (issue #27)
entry.content:
The 2024 leap year gives us an extra day to get things done. I hope you will use some of that time to learn what our development teams have been rolling out to make it easier to create SAP Fiori apps, using the same tools and technologies that SAP uses to build apps for SAP S/4HANA. Make sure to check out the two new SAPUI5 adaptation tutorials, listed in the Developer Training section below.

If you want to meet with fellow developers and the SAP engineers who build our professional development tools, I encourage you to join our monthly SAP Fiori elements and SAP Fiori tools roundtable group.

Our next meeting is April 10, 2024.

Learn about the group at https://blogs.sap.com/2021/07/31/peer-to-peer-learning-at-the-sap-fiori-elements-and-sap-fiori-tools-roundtable/
You can also email me if you would like an invitation.

Was this forwarded to you? Subscribe to the SAP Fiori development newsletter.

Your editorial team, 
Peter, Oliver, and Raz

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Development News

Extending SAP Fiori elements the right way using standard processes

There are many ways to extend SAP apps, including using the flexible programming model in SAP Fiori elements for OData v4. This post shows several examples of bad coding practices, explains why they are wrong, and gives you the right way to implement these features instead.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/extending-sap-fiori-elements-the-right-way-using-standard-processes/ba-p/13588502

Building resilient applications using SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP)

In this post, you will learn what a resilient app is, why this is important to your end users, and how to build one using SAP’s Cloud Application Programming Model.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/building-resilient-applications-using-sap-cloud-application-programming/ba-p/13628647

Creating tree tables with OData V4 on SAP BTP ABAP environment

If you want to implement hierarchies in the SAP BTP ABAP environment, here is an end-to-end guide on how to create tree tables.
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/creating-tree-tables-with-odata-v4-on-sap-btp-abap-environment/ba-p/13605160 

Introducing UI5 linter

A linter is a static code analysis tool used to find programming bugs, stylistic errors, and suspicious constructs. The UI5 linter identifies problematic code that does not follow UI5 best practices.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/introducing-ui5-linter/ba-p/13633898

UI5 walkthrough tutorial with TypeScript

In this new tutorial, the UI5 team introduces all development paradigms of UI5 and demonstrates the benefits of TypeScript with UI5.
https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/dad1905a07f849ce9c509721317d38d8 

Extend an upload set to SAP Fiori elements and utilize document management service

If you are new to BTP, this post explores several utilities to help you come up to speed with programming and integration tasks.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/extend-upload-set-to-fiori-elements-and-utilize-document-management-service/ba-p/13613911

Exposing an OData Service from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to SAP BTP

This blog post explains how to expose a CDS view as an API using developer extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to be consumed in the SAP Business Technology Platform.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/exposing-an-odata-service-from-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-to-the-sap/ba-p/13628248

Product updates for SAP Business Application Studio - February 2024 edition

SAP Business Application Studio continues to evolve. This post shows some of the recent upgrades. In the next issue, there will be much more to share, as some big new functionality will be coming through Joule in SAP Build Code.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/product-updates-for-sap-business-application-studio-february-2024-edition/ba-p/13623478

Our latest roadmaps are available 

SAPUI5 roadmap
SAP Fiori elements roadmap
SAP Business Application Studio roadmap
SAP Fiori tools roadmap

New Tutorials

Learn how Key User Adaptation for SAPUI5 works with a hands-on approach using demo apps

Learn how Key User Adaptation for SAPUI5 works with a hands-on approach using demo apps.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-tutorial-mission-key-user-adaptation-for-sapui5-applications/ba-p/13639694

Tutorial: SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects in SAP Business Application Studio are not new. But what is new is the support for SAP S/HANA Cloud. This enables developers to enhance SAPUI5 applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud with comprehensive features that were previously exclusive to on-premise customers. See this blog post linking to an extensive, end-to-end tutorial:
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/extending-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-using-sapui5-adaptation-projects/ba-p/13607813

Developer Events

SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Dublin summary

Our first-ever SAP Fiori Innovation Day was a great success. Read Ian's summary to see what you missed. If the topic excites you, we will be having one in Chicago in June and Paris in October. Stay tuned for more info. 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-innovation-day-in-dublin-demos-implementation-tips-and-lots-of-ai/ba-p/13618951

SAP Fiori elements and Lufthansa @ DSAG Technology Day 2024 summary

At the DSAG Technologietage 2024 event (German SAP user group), Sebastian Werner gave a talk alongside Lufthansa on how they use SAP Fiori elements & tools.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-elements-and-lufthansa-dsag-technologietage-2024/ba-p/13629434

Mark your calendar for UI5con and reCAP

The community conferences around UI5 and CAP are coming back in 2024, see the announcements on UI5con and reCAP.

https://openui5.org/ui5con/germany2024/
https://recap-conf.dev/
https://abapconf.org/

These three events together form CodeConnect 2024, which starts the week of June 3.
https://code-connect.dev/ 

More Resources

Visit our community pages
SAPUI5
SAP Fiori elements
SAP Business Application Studio
SAP Fiori tools

Ask a question in the community
SAPUI5
ask.sapfiorielements.com
SAP Business Application Studio
ask.sapfioritools.com

Back issues from the past year

SAP Fiori development newsletter #26 (January 2023)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #25 (November 2023)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #24 (September 2023)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #23 (July 2023)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #22 (May 2023)

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 3
entry.content:
PWS:

$cloudEventStructuredHttpMessage = $cloudEvent | ConvertTo-HttpMessage -ContentMode Structured

Write-Host "Headers:" -ForegroundColor Green
$cloudEventStructuredHttpMessage.Headers | Out-Host

Write-Host "Body:" -ForegroundColor Green
Read-CloudEventData -CloudEvent $cloudEvent | Out-Host

$uri = "${SOLACE_TRANSPORT_PROTOCOL}://${SOLACE_HOST}:${SOLACE_PORT}/TOPIC/${topic}"
$body = Read-CloudEventData -CloudEvent $cloudEvent

$headers = @{
    "Content-Type" = "application/cloudevents+json"
    "Authorization" = "Basic " + [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes("$($SOLACE_USERNAME):$($SOLACE_PASSWORD)"))
}

try {
    $webResponse = Invoke-WebRequest -Method Post -Uri $uri -Headers $headers -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"
    Write-Host "Response status code:" $webResponse.StatusCode
}
catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.Value__) $($_.Exception.Message)"
}

Result:

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Instance Deleted from Trial althoug...
entry.content: I am also facing the same issue.
